'''thashunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycolipid|mycolipid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycolipid|mycolipid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thashunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæshinith|thæshinith]] || [[word:thæshinij|thæshinij]] || [[word:thæshinish|thæshinish]] || [[word:thæshini|thæshini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thashushunuth|thashushunuth]] || [[word:thashushunuj|thashushunuj]] || [[word:thashushunush|thashushunush]] || [[word:thashushunu|thashushunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashunuth|thashunuth]] || [[word:thashunuj|thashunuj]] || [[word:thashunush|thashunush]] || [[word:thashunu|thashunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashufnuth|thashufnuth]] || [[word:thashufnuj|thashufnuj]] || [[word:thashufnush|thashufnush]] || [[word:thashufnuf|thashufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thashunuthu|thashunuthu]] || [[word:thashunuju|thashunuju]] || [[word:thashunushu|thashunushu]] || [[word:thashunuku|thashunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thashunuth|thashunuth]] || [[word:thashunuj|thashunuj]] || [[word:thashunush|thashunush]] || [[word:thashunu|thashunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thashunuthul|thashunuthul]] || [[word:thashunujul|thashunujul]] || [[word:thashunushul|thashunushul]] || [[word:thashunukul|thashunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thashunuthuthu|thashunuthuthu]] || [[word:thashunujuju|thashunujuju]] || [[word:thashunushushu|thashunushushu]] || [[word:thashunuku|thashunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thashunuthun|thashunuthun]] || [[word:thashunujun|thashunujun]] || [[word:thashunushun|thashunushun]] || [[word:thashunukun|thashunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thashunuthuoro|thashunuthuoro]] || [[word:thashunujuoro|thashunujuoro]] || [[word:thashunushuoro|thashunushuoro]] || [[word:thashunukuoro|thashunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
